final:
module decoder_4to16 (
    input wire [3:0] in,
    output reg [15:0] out
);

always @(*) begin
    out = 16'b0; // Set all outputs to 0
    out[in] = 1'b1; // Set the corresponding output to 1
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out[7:0] = ~in;
      out[15:8] = in;
    end
  end

endmodule
